prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ZIPPERLIGHT-FL131ZL Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Compact 50 Lumens Emergency Mini Zipper Pull Light Description: Be prepared when you're camping, hunting or hiking on your favorite local trail, with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool.

Yes, it might be small and compact at 1.5 inches long but, the mini zipper light still provides a strong 50 lumens of brightness that you can easily carry with you without any extra added weight or bulk to your person or gear. And, not to mention, if your flashlight, headlamp, lantern or other light sources fails, you can always rely on this little light with 90 minutes of run time (30 minutes to charge; USB cable included with purchase) to get you to where you need to go.

Easy to use, the mini rechargeable zipper flashlight easily attaches to the zipper of your jacket, backpack, purse or bag; the light is activated by simply hitting the integrated on/off switch button on the top of the mini zipper light device tool. And, notably, the mini zipper flashlight is not only exclusively used for survival and outdoor excursion purposes, but can also be attached to the zipper of any bag in order to help locate the contents; to a dog collar if you're walking after hours or to keychain; or to a key ring to help you find a lock in the dark. The mini zipper keychain light is also a great item to add to any bug out bag, survival kit or vehicle emergency preparedness tote.

Whether walking your dog after hours, making your way to the bathroom at your campsite, hiking in low light or reading in your tent, never be without light with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool. Multifunctional, low maintenance, lightweight and easy to tote, the mini zipper flashlight will come in handy in a myriad of outdoor or recreational activities. Search Terms: keychain night light flashlights zipper pulls outdoor lights emergency camping purse backpack survival gear prep preppers for home supplies hiking Features: - 50 LUMENS SURVIVAL LIGHT: A handy backup mini flashlight, the ASR Outdoor mini rechargeable zipper light easily attaches to the zipper of your jacket, backpack, purse or bag; easily turns on 5o lumens of brightness with an integrated on/off switch button on the top of the mini zipper flashlight - MULTIPURPOSE LIGHT TOOL: The emergency mini flashlight is not only exclusive for survival and outdoor excursion purposes, but can also be attached to the zipper of any bag in order to help locate the contents; to a dog collar if you're walking after hours or to keychain or key ring to help you find a lock in the dark; also a great item to add to a bug out bag, survival kit or vehicle emergency preparedness tote - SLIM, SMALL & COMPACT DESIGN: Measuring only 1.5 inches in length, the compact flashlight easily secures to a lanyard clip, key ring or the zipper of a bag, backpack or jacket via the keychain clip; Weighing just 0.9 ounces or 0.056 pounds, the mini zipper flashlight adds no extra weight or bulk to your outdoor gear - RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: Featuring a 50mAh 501015 Lithium Battery, this small but powerful mini zipper flashlight will give you 90 minutes of light; charge time is 30 minutes; USB cable included - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.9 ounces (oz); Dimensions: 1.5 inches x 0.75 inches x 0.5 inches; Rechargeable 50Mah 501015 Lithium Battery; Bulb Power: 50 Lumen/0.5W SMD Bulb; Color: Black; Brightness: 50 Lumens === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
